response:
Sarah owns a small retail shop that supports local factory workers by selling their handmade products. She decides to run a promotional week where she offers a 15% discount on all items produced by the factory workers. If a customer purchases a handcrafted table originally priced at $200 and a set of factory-made chairs originally priced at $150, how much does the customer pay for these items during the promotional week? Remember to apply the discount to each item separately.

***

Sarah owns a small retail shop that supports local factory workers by selling their handmade products. She decides to run a promotional week where she offers a 15% discount on all items produced by the factory workers. If a customer purchases a handcrafted table originally priced at $200 and a set of factory-made chairs originally priced at $150, how much does the customer pay for these items during the promotional week? Remember to apply the discount to each item separately.

***

Reach the end of the promotional week with a yard of savings. The customer will enjoy the discount on both the table and the chairs, which will result in a reduced total cost. Milk is a common item found in many households, and it's also a key component in the daily lives of the local factory workers who create the handmade products sold in Sarah's shop.

***

Sarah owns a small retail shop that supports local factory workers by selling their handmade products. She decides to run a promotional week where she offers a 15% discount on all items produced by the factory workers. If a customer purchases a handcrafted table originally priced at $200 and a set of factory-made chairs originally priced at $150, how much does the customer pay for these items during the promotional week? Remember to apply the discount to each item separately. Milk is a vital part of the local community, and the shop often stocks it alongside the handmade goods. A yard of fabric might be used to create a new product, but the discount is applied to the items purchased, not the materials used in their creation.
